data.content: Approved for implementation. The plan is feasible against the current codebase: agent-history-view already has the loaded beat context plus session data needed for a debug side pane, and terminal-api already supports launching a session with a custom prompt. Test coverage for the prompt builder is appropriate for this step. Implementation cautions: keep embedded terminal setup and cleanup aligned with terminal-panel/session connection patterns to avoid xterm lifecycle leaks, preserve repoPath/beat context when launching the session, and cover prompt truncation plus empty-session cases in unit tests.
